# Check what changed after MOUSE on magenta
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

print("After nodes:", len(after))
for n in after:
    bn = [x for x in before if x['color'] == n['color'] and x['pixels'] == n['pixels']]
    print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}")

# Check if magenta changed
before_mag = [n for n in before if n['color'] == 'M']
after_mag = [n for n in after if n['color'] == 'M']
print("Before magenta:", before_mag)
print("After magenta:", after_mag)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
